if.if: AND ( r.question ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(r.answer, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(r.reason_message, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(r.error_message, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM qa_record_citations c WHERE c.qa_record_id = r.id AND ( c.file_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.snippet, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') ) ) )

mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.group_id, r.question, r.answer, r.answered, r.reason_code, r.reason_message, r.evidence_level, r.citation_count, r.prompt_tokens, r.completion_tokens, r.total_tokens, r.is_estimated, r.latency_ms, r.model_name, r.endpoint, r.success, r.error_message, r.created_at, r.deleted_at, r.deleted_by, r.delete_reason
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS "totalQuestions", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = TRUE AND r.success = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "answeredCount", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = FALSE AND r.success = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "refusalCount", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = FALSE AND r.success = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "failureCount", COALESCE(AVG(r.latency_ms), 0) AS "avgLatencyMs", COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.latency_ms), 0) AS "p95LatencyMs", COALESCE(SUM(r.prompt_tokens), 0) AS "totalPromptTokens", COALESCE(SUM(r.completion_tokens), 0) AS "totalCompletionTokens", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_records r WHERE

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', r.created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", COUNT(1) AS "totalQuestions", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = TRUE AND r.success = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "answeredCount", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = FALSE AND r.success = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "refusalCount", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.answered = FALSE AND r.success = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "failureCount", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost", COALESCE(AVG(r.latency_ms), 0) AS "avgLatencyMs" FROM qa_records r WHERE GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', r.created_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('day', r.created_at)

SELECT COALESCE(r.evidence_level, 'UNKNOWN') AS "name", COUNT(1) AS "count", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_records r WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(r.evidence_level, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC

SELECT COALESCE(r.model_name, 'UNKNOWN') AS "name", COUNT(1) AS "count", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_records r WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(r.model_name, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(r.endpoint, 'UNKNOWN') AS "name", COUNT(1) AS "count", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_records r WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(r.endpoint, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC

SELECT COALESCE(c.retrieval_source, 'UNKNOWN') AS "name", COUNT(1) AS "count", 0 AS "totalTokens", 0 AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_record_citations c INNER JOIN qa_records r ON r.id = c.qa_record_id WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(c.retrieval_source, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC

SELECT CONCAT('鐢ㄦ埛 ', r.user_id) AS "name", COUNT(1) AS "count", COALESCE(SUM(r.total_tokens), 0) AS "totalTokens", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((r.prompt_tokens * 2.0 + r.completion_tokens * 6.0) / 1000000.0), 0), 6) AS "estimatedCost" FROM qa_records r WHERE GROUP BY r.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM qa_records r WHERE
mapper.update:
UPDATE qa_records r SET deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{scopeCtx.currentUserId}, delete_reason = #{deleteReason} WHERE AND r.id IN
#{id}
